functions.name: useEffect with data fetching without caching

recommendation.title: Use TanStack Query for data fetching

catches: Data fetching in useEffect without caching
fix: Use TanStack Query for data fetching

action.message: useEffect with fetch - consider TanStack Query for caching

functions.name: Props passed through 3+ levels

functions.name: Multiple console.log without context

functions.name: Server-only imports in client code
functions.description: Server-only modules imported in client code increase bundle size. Use dynamic imports or move server logic.

recommendation.title: Avoid server-only imports in client code
recommendation.description: Server-only modules imported in client code increase bundle size. Use dynamic imports or move server logic.

fix: Use dynamic imports for server modules
Move server logic to server components

action.message: Server-only module imported in client code - this increases bundle size

functions.name: Authentication without authorization check

recommendation.title: Add authorization checks
